# Tucicovenco Adrian | Portfolio & Research

> Software Engineer and Machine Learning Researcher based in Bucharest, Romania. Specializing in Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) and Machine Learning Systems architecture.

## Core Expertise
- **Machine Learning**: Production-ready AI systems, grounding experimental intelligence.
- **HCI**: Building intuitive interfaces where user intent is central.
- **Software Architecture**: Distributed systems and complex web infrastructure.

## Current Roles
- **Machine Learning Researcher** at Staticlabs (Bucharest, RO).
- **Solutions Architect** at V8media.

## Key Content
- [Home](https://tuci.dev/): Professional profile and bio.
- [Blog](https://tuci.dev/blog): Research notes and technical essays.
    - [Grounding Intelligence](https://tuci.dev/blog/grounding-intelligence): Notes on production ML.
    - [The New Age](https://tuci.dev/blog/the-new-age): Reflections on modern architecture.
